message.content:
You are connected to my GIThib - please backup the enite solution as a        
Private repo - make sure the ionitial PRD, and all documents including session  
documents, plans and memory are backed up.

content.text: I'll check the current state of the project and then create a private GitHub repo to back everything up.

content.text: Now let me update the `.gitignore` to ensure we include important files but exclude sensitive ones and large binaries, then initialize git and create the private repo.

input.command: ls -la server/.env 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat server/.env 2>/dev/null || echo "NO_ENV"
